name: ADVANCED OXYGEN TECHNOLOGIES INC
summary: Advanced Oxygen Technologies, Inc. (AOXY) is a Delaware holding company with operations through two wholly owned subsidiaries: Anton Nielsen Vojens ApS (ANV), a Danish company that owns and leases commercial real estate in Vojens, Denmark to Circle K Denmark A/S (lease expires 2026), and Sharx Inc./Sharx DK ApS, which distributes Cleaver ApS products for the logistics and cargo industry across Europe, South America, and North America.
